name: github_check_user_can_be_assigned_to_issue
description: Check if a user can be assigned to a specific issue (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/issues/{issue_number}/assignees/{assignee}). HTTP 204 means assignable; 404 returns can_be_assigned: false. See [Check if a user can be assigned to an issue](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/issues/assignees?apiVersion=2026-03-10#check-if-a-user-can-be-assigned-to-an-issue).
